name: EA SPORTS FC™ 25
short_description: EA SPORTS FC™ 25 gives you more ways to win for the club. Team up with friends in your favourite modes with the new 5v5 Rush, and manage your club to victory as FC IQ delivers more tactical control than ever before.
supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Arabic*, Czech, Danish, Dutch*, Japanese*, Korean*, Norwegian, Polish*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Spanish - Latin America*, Swedish, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
